qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the "General comments" section in the RPP Progress Report online form?
qa_pairs.answer: The "General comments" section in the RPP Progress Report online form allows Principal Investigators (PIs) to include any additional comments they may have or to attach a PDF file if needed.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to a multi-year Research Platforms and Portals (RPP) project after its annual progress report is completed and reviewed?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a multi-year RPP project's annual progress report is completed and reviewed, the science score from the original RPP application, along with any requested updates to the original resource request, is entered into the normal allocation process. Through this standard process, all new and continuing platforms and portals are then allocated resources.
